mapper.select: SELECT user_id, bluenote_no, nickname, avatar_file_id, avatar_url, bio, gender, birthday, region_code, home_cover_file_id, home_cover_url, user_status, profile_version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM bluenote_user.user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT user_id, bluenote_no, nickname, avatar_file_id, avatar_url, bio, gender, birthday, region_code, home_cover_file_id, home_cover_url, user_status, profile_version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM bluenote_user.user_profile WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id IN
#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_user.user_profile SET nickname = #{entity.nickname}, avatar_file_id = #{entity.avatarFileId}, avatar_url = #{entity.avatarUrl}, bio = #{entity.bio}, gender = #{entity.gender}, birthday = #{entity.birthday}, region_code = #{entity.regionCode}, home_cover_file_id = #{entity.homeCoverFileId}, home_cover_url = #{entity.homeCoverUrl}, user_status = #{entity.userStatus}, profile_version = #{entity.profileVersion}, updated_at = #{entity.updatedAt} WHERE user_id = #{entity.userId} AND profile_version = #{baseProfileVersion} AND deleted = 0
